center.name: Serra dos Órgãos
center.summary: Serra dos Órgãos是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Itatiaia spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is named for Serra do Itatiaia and also occurs in Serra do Caraça and Serra dos Órgãos

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is named for Serra do Itatiaia and also occurs in Serra do Caraça and Serra dos Órgãos
